items.blocker_message: mobile/app.json must include a real UUID-shaped extra.eas.projectId.
items.action: Bind mobile/app.json to the real Expo project id. Placeholder UUIDs are not accepted.
accepted_evidence: mobile/app.json expo.extra.eas.projectId is a real UUID-shaped EAS project id

items.action: Provide Apple account and app-specific password needed by non-interactive submit readiness.

items.blocker_message: App Store Connect API credentials are required for TestFlight evidence.
items.action: Provide ASC API credentials so TestFlight build state can be queried as structured evidence.
commands: APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID=<issuer> APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID=<key-id> APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=<p8-path> npm --prefix mobile run release:external-evidence:validate

items.action: Query TestFlight and prove the matching build is present, valid, and not expired.
commands: APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID=<issuer> APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID=<key-id> APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=<p8-path> npm --prefix mobile run eas-ios-release:smoke -- --run --require-testflight

items.action: Run native smoke on a connected physical device; simulator and emulator evidence are not accepted.
commands: APP_IOS_DEVICE_UDID=<trusted-device-udid> APP_IOS_DEVICE_APP_PATH=<signed-app-path> npm --prefix mobile run release:external-evidence:validate -- --physical-platform=ios --report-dir=<report-dir>
APP_IOS_DEVICE_UDID=<trusted-device-udid> APP_IOS_DEVICE_APP_PATH=<signed-app-path> npm --prefix mobile run release:external-evidence:run -- --physical-platform=ios --report-dir=<report-dir>
APP_IOS_DEVICE_UDID=<trusted-device-udid> APP_IOS_DEVICE_APP_PATH=<signed-app-path> npm --prefix mobile run physical-device:smoke -- --platform=ios --run
accepted_evidence: docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/App-Physical-Device-*.json

items.action: Query a controlled native crash event and prove release, environment, native runtime, and crash-like signal.
commands: APP_SENTRY_ORG=<org> APP_SENTRY_PROJECT=<project> APP_SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN=<token> APP_NATIVE_CRASH_SENTRY_EVENT_ID=<event-id> npm --prefix mobile run native-crash:runtime:smoke -- --run
accepted_evidence: docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/App-Native-Crash-Runtime-*.json

items.blocker_message: No connected iOS physical device is visible to xctrace.
items.action: Attach, unlock, and trust an iPhone visible to xctrace on the runner.
